item.title: eighteen
item.description: When I graduated high school and turned eighteen a year and a month ago, I told myself one thing and one thing only:

item.title: failure
item.description: midterms, applying for uni, work, ex, maintaining friendships, going outside, being healthy… I can’t do it.

item.title: I Can’t Hear the Fireworks
item.description: I dont know the first thing about love.

item.title: I had that same dream again
item.description: I had that same dream again. Oh, you know, just the dream where you die.

item.title: I’ll be the Losing Heroine in Every World
item.description: But I can only be the losing heroine so many times before it kills me you know?

item.title: Last Words of a Shooting Star
item.description: What is the point of it all?

item.title: not a lot, just forever.
item.description: just a love that lasts forever would be nice.

item.title: On Melancholy Hill
item.description: Up on Melancholy Hill, theres a plastic tree.

item.title: summergazer
item.description: Does everything happen for a reason?

item.title: The World Wasn’t Made for Us
item.description: This world wasn’t made for me and you, so I don’t want any part of it.

item.title: Three Months of Happiness
item.description: When I entered high school, I thought it would be like every high school romcom anime I had ever watched. It wasnt.

item.title: Turning 20 and Chainsaw Man - The Movie: Reze arc
item.description: I spent the first hour of my 20s watching Denji get repeatedly blown up by the cutest terrorist I have ever seen and genuinely, I couldn’t think of a better way to spend it.

item.title: two moons
item.description: what does it remind you of?

item.title: until
item.description: the words will always escape me —until it is too late.

item.title: Your Name?
item.description: Do you remember when I wrote ‘I love you’ on your hand?

item.title: You’re my Everything
item.description: How come I’m trying to be happy for others instead of myself?
